role: This file is the builder side-panel chat surface that embeds a streaming Claude Code session tied to the shared indicated element and forager selection.
capabilities: Streamed chat with /api/claude/turn (text, tool, error, done events)
Shared indicated locus display and clear
Forager multi-select context block composition with 6KB cap
One-shot arming/disanning of context block for next turn
Build-intent handoff via mintBuildIntent at indicated address
substance_why: The file implements a complete chat panel with streaming transport, local state, context-block assembly, indication chips, and a build-intent handoff button.
interactions_present: Type and send message (Enter or button)
Compose and arm forager selection as context block
Click 'build this' to mint a build-intent
Receive context block from mobile tray builder-context window event
interactions_missing: No in-panel way to set/indicate an element (only clear)
No session reset or conversation history load on mount
No explicit error boundary in this file despite the comment
performance_risks: One React setMsgs call per streamed event with no batching/throttling
Entire message list re-renders on every new line
Unbounded msgs array growth for long sessions
useForagerSelection may trigger re-renders on every editor selection change
reuse_why: The builder-chat domain logic (session streaming, context block, build-intent handoff) should be preserved, but the UI shell and state orchestration need rebuilding for the redesigned form.
decomposition_hints: Extract streaming session logic into a dedicated hook/service
Extract context-block composition from forager selection into a utility/hook
Split UI into panel chrome, message log, input bar, indication chips, and handoff button
Decouple mobile tray event listener from the chat component
Separate build-intent handoff into its own component/hook
